Risk Title: Internal Tester Unavailability Due to Resignation
Risk Desc:
Cause:
The internal tester has resigned, resulting in the absence of a dedicated resource for testing.

Condition:
There is no internal tester available to perform critical testing activities, including functional, regression, and integration testing.

Consequence:
This could lead to delays in the testing phase, increased chances of undetected defects, compromised product quality, and potential delays in project timelines. Project-Level     Organizational                         Resources         Major    Unlikely    Medium
Category: A current team member has been allocated to cover the role as part of the mitigation plan.
Risk Type: Temporarily assign members from other teams with testing experience to assist in critical testing activities.
